---
title: "eda"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
clinical_dir <- "/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/clinical.cart.2026-04-07/"

clinical_raw <- read_tsv(
  file.path(clinical_dir, "clinical.tsv"),
  na = c("'--", "--", "", "NA")
)

glimpse(clinical_raw)
dim(clinical_raw)
```

```{r}
clinical_core <- clinical_raw %>%
  transmute(
    case_id = cases.submitter_id,
    days_to_death = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(demographic.days_to_death)),
    days_to_last_follow_up = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(diagnoses.days_to_last_follow_up)),
    vital_status = demographic.vital_status,
    age_at_diagnosis = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(diagnoses.age_at_diagnosis)),
    sex = demographic.gender,
    race = demographic.race,
    ethnicity = demographic.ethnicity
  ) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r}
clinical_survival <- clinical_core %>%
  mutate(
    survived_500d = case_when(
      !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death > 500 ~ 1,
      !is.na(days_to_death) & days_to_death <= 500 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

```{r}
clinical_survival %>%
  summarise(
    n_cases = n(),
    n_with_days_to_death = sum(!is.na(days_to_death)),
    n_survived_500d_known = sum(!is.na(survived_500d)),
    n_survived_500d_yes = sum(survived_500d == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_survived_500d_no = sum(survived_500d == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

# RNA-seq

```{r}
rna_dir <- "/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/"

rnaseq_raw <- read_csv(file.path(rna_dir, "gene_count_matrix_1pass_TCGA.csv"))

dim(rnaseq_raw)
names(rnaseq_raw)[1:10]
```

```{r}
rna_samples <- tibble(sample_id = names(rnaseq_raw)[-1]) %>%
  mutate(
    case_id = str_sub(sample_id, 1, 12)
  )

rna_samples %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
clinical_cases <- clinical_survival %>%
  distinct(case_id)

rna_case_overlap <- rna_samples %>%
  semi_join(clinical_cases, by = "case_id")

nrow(rna_samples)
nrow(rna_case_overlap)
```

# Methylation sample sheet

```{r}
meth_dir <- "/Users/katz/Desktop/UNi Year 4/Semester 1/Predictive Analytics /Assessments/Project/PAP-Project/data/raw/"

meth_sheet <- read_tsv(
  file.path(meth_dir, "gdc_sample_sheet.2026-04-07.tsv")
)

glimpse(meth_sheet)
```

```{r}
meth_map <- meth_sheet %>%
  transmute(
    file_name = `File Name`,
    sample_id = `Sample ID`,
    case_id = `Case ID`
  ) %>%
  distinct()

meth_map %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```
